expo.name: SoundLoom
expo.author: jayis1
expo.description: Bioacoustic Soil Health Monitor — companion app for SoundLom sensor pods

infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: SoundLoom uses Bluetooth to communicate with buried sensor pods for configuration and data offload.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SoundLoom uses location to map pod positions in the field.
